import { useState } from 'react'; import React from 'react'; import './Cdc.css'; import C1 from '../../Assets/industry.webp'; import C2 from '../../Assets/h13.webp'; import C3 from '../../Assets/orvarsuprem.webp'; const Cdc = () => { const [r1, setR1] = useState(true); const [r2, setR2] = useState(false); const [r3, setR3] = useState(false); const clkHnd1 = () => { setR1(true); setR2(false); setR3(false); }; const clkHnd2 = () => { setR1(false); setR2(true); setR3(false); }; const clkHnd3 = () => { setR1(false); setR2(false); setR3(true); }; return (

  • Durable
  • Easy to install
